📬 Transactional Email

Send password resets, receipts and alerts from your own mail infra — open source alternatives to SendGrid, Mailgun and Postmark.

Popular SaaS in this category

Tap any tool to see curated open source alternatives with honest strengths and weaknesses.

Alternatives to SendGrid

Transactional email API for apps, now Twilio SendGrid.

3 alternatives

Alternatives to Mailgun

Developer-focused transactional email and SMTP relay.

3 alternatives
Ad slot — category middle

Open source projects in this category

Postal

Self-hosted mail server for sending transactional and bulk email.

License: MIT Self-host: ★★★★☆

Haraka

High-performance Node.js SMTP server used by big senders.

License: MIT Self-host: ★★★★☆
